title: NEON OVERDRIVE
description: Neon Overdrive is a high octane, anti-gravity racing game that takes place in the near-future cyberpunk city of Cloud Medina. You control a high-tech hovercraft and hone your skills to get the fastest time possible on the track. This game is a 2-man project with Tarik Bulut where I designed all art elements and environment. This game premiered in an exhibition in the German University in Cairo. Original Soundtrack by Ahmed Fouad (MoozMusic)
